exploration.title: Atlas Synthesis — Current State <-> Goals/Vision Grounding
openQuestions: What is the user's next instruction / direction this baseline grounds — i.e., the outcome-decomposition half of atlas-synthesis (sequencing the vision into explorations/goals)?
First IP-law workflow wedge (office-action review recommended, synthesis/32 §5.2) + graduate law-practice from domain-only to a minimum-viable slice (synthesis/30 §A-NW-2).
Migrate/port the proven v3 knowledge engine (cross the v3->v4 boundary, strip the email domain) vs rebuild clean in v4 (synthesis/43) — port only the thin slice the first workflow needs.
